title: Pickable Pets
description:
Allows owners to pick up their pets into an item form. 
Works on Fabric and Forge.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cf314dca8db67ca81f36fae24504aac707339e.png) ![https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-apii](https://i.imgur.com/VLsMyfv.png) ![https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/requires/cloth-config-api_64h.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/667690/description_75a55e66-cd49-4ed8-bd6f-313911329d93.png) Active Versions: 1.21.1 ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cf314dca8db67ca81f36fae24504aac707339e.png)

This mod gives you the ability to pick up pets, keep them as Items and place them back where you want.  
- They can be picked up by either sneak + right-click or with a key shortcut. (default: G)   - Pets that are sleeping, dead or more then X distance away can't be picked up.  (default: 40) - Picking up a pet cost levels. (default: 2 levels)   - Baby pets can't be picked up by default. (configurable) - Blacklisted pets can't be picked up. (default: none) - Revive Altar functions as a save for your pets. - Right click with a pet in item form to save it in the altar. - If the pet dies, right click the altar with the revive item to revive it. (default: Diamond)    All features can be disable/changed in the config file (or in the Mod Menu on Fabric).  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cf314dca8db67ca81f36fae24504aac707339e.png)
None at the moment!
If you find any incompatible mod let me know and I'll see what can be done. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cf314dca8db67ca81f36fae24504aac707339e.png)
